effect: The entity continuously channels unstable Aethel energy, increasing WIS and magic attack power.

name: Void Burst
effect: Releases a condensed burst of void energy that explodes on impact.

name: Aethel Decay Field
effect: Creates a corrupted field of Aethel energy that weakens enemies.

name: Abyssal Predator Aura
effect: The presence of the apex predator weakens nearby enemies while empowering its own attacks.

name: Reaver Slash
effect: A brutal claw slash infused with Aethel corruption.

name: Void Rend
effect: Tears open a rift of void energy that damages enemies and causes bleeding.

name: Abyssal Roar
effect: The Reaver unleashes a terrifying roar that weakens enemy defenses.

name: Claw Slash
effect: The drake slashes its target with burning claws.

name: Ember Bite
effect: A fiery bite that has a chance to burn the target.

name: Turret Shot
effect: The deployed turret fires a rapid shot at the nearest enemy.

name: Phase Drift
effect: Each successful attack has a 20% chance to cause the next attack to ignore Defense completely.

name: Phantom Slash
effect: A blink-strike that deals heavy damage and reduces enemy AGI by 15% for 2 turns.

name: Aethel Mending
effect: At the start of each turn, the ally with the lowest HP% in the party regenerates 4% of their Max HP.

name: Radiant Pulse
effect: Heals all party members for WIS * 1.8 HP and removes one debuff from each.

name: Arcane Resonance
effect: Allies spend 2 less MP when using Active skills (minimum 1 MP).

name: Crystalline Cage
effect: Encases the target in crystal, dealing WIS-based damage and rooting them for 2 turns.

name: Backstab Protocol
effect: Attacks against enemies with active debuffs deal 18% additional damage.

name: Venom Chain
effect: Strikes the target and applies Poison dealing 8% Max HP WIS turn for 3 turns.

name: Iron Bastion
effect: Reduces all incoming damage by 8%. When HP drops below 30%, gain +20% Defense for 3 turns (once WIS battle).

name: Titan Slam
effect: Slams the ground, dealing Defense-enhanced damage to all enemies and reducing their Attack by 15% for 2 turns.

name: Tactical Uplink
effect: Party members gain +8% WIS at battle start. On each kill, all party members restore 5 MP.

name: Overload Pulse
effect: Fires a concentrated energy pulse dealing WIS-scaled AoE damage and reducing all enemy Attack and Defense by 10% for 2 turns.

name: Shard Resonance
effect: Healing skills restore 15% more HP. After healing, the caster gains +5% WIS for 1 turn (stackable up to 3×).

name: Shard Benediction
effect: Bathes all allies in Shard light. Heals WIS * 2.5 HP and grants all allies +12% Attack and +12% Defense for 2 turns.

name: Scorched Earth
effect: Deals 5% additional damage WIS Burn stack on the target. Basic attacks have a 25% chance to Burn for 1 turn.

name: Forge Cannon
effect: Fires a superheated round dealing heavy damage. Burns target for 6% Max HP WIS turn for 3 turns.

name: Void Attunement
effect: Magical skills gain 25% penetration against elemental resistances. Immune to silence effects.

name: Arcane Singularity
effect: Creates a void singularity that strikes all enemies, reducing their AGI by 20% and dealing heavy WIS-based damage.

name: Living Fortress
effect: Redirects 30% of damage taken by all party members to this ally. Reduce all damage Corvan receives by 15%.

name: Bastion Wall
effect: Raises an iron wall, granting all party members a shield absorbing Defense * 1.8 damage for 2 turns.

name: Aethel Sovereignty
effect: At the start of battle, all allies gain +15% to all stats for 2 turns. Elara restores 8 MP WIS turn passively.

name: Nexus Convergence
effect: Draws upon Nexus Core energy. Deals WIS-scaled AoE damage to all enemies, heals all allies for WIS * 2.0, and grants party +20% Attack for 2 turns.

name: Shadow Market
effect: Each time Vael kills an enemy, all allies gain a 10% Attack buff (stacks up to 3×). Vael's attacks can never be evaded.

name: Black Tide
effect: Unleashes a shadow wave that strikes all enemies three times for Attack * 2.5 each. Enemies hit are slowed (-30% AGI) for 2 turns.

name: Stone Vigil
effect: When Thorn's HP drops below 40%, all incoming damage is halved for 3 turns (once WIS battle). Ally party members receive +5% Defense passively.

name: Barrier Crush
effect: Channels defensive force into a devastating slam. Deals Defense-scaled damage and inflicts Stun for 1 turn.

name: Mind Lattice
effect: All party members gain +10% WIS. Each time an ally uses an Active skill, Wren regenerates 3 MP.

name: Thought Weave
effect: Links all party members in a mental lattice for 3 turns: each ally that takes a hit grants the others +5% Attack (stackable).

name: Armour Breaker
effect: Every attack Rook lands permanently reduces the target's Defense by 2% (stacks up to 20%). Rook ignores 10% of enemy Defense at all times.

name: Demolish
effect: Smashes the target with an overcharged strike, dealing heavy damage and instantly reducing their Defense by 25% for 2 turns.

name: Smuggler's Remedy
effect: Vale's heals apply a secondary Regen stack for 2 turns (5% Max HP/turn). If Vale's HP falls below 25%, immediately heal self for 20% Max HP (once WIS battle).

name: Black Salve
effect: Applies a potent Cartel-grade salve to a single ally, healing WIS * 2.2 HP and removing all debuffs. Target gains immunity to debuffs for 1 turn.

name: Target Lock
effect: After 2 consecutive attacks on the same target, Axiom's third hit deals +40% damage and is guaranteed to hit. Axiom cannot miss on the first attack of combat.

name: Sniper Protocol
effect: A precision long-range shot that deals 3× Attack damage, ignores all Defense, and cannot be evaded.

name: Shard Conductor
effect: Healing skills used by any party member cost 3 less MP. Nimbus regenerates 5 HP WIS turn for every party member still standing.

name: Spirit Cascade
effect: Channels Shard energy through the party in a cascade, healing each ally for WIS * 1.5 HP and granting +8% to all stats for 2 turns.

name: Unyielding
effect: Gorm cannot be killed by a single hit (survives with 1 HP if damage would be fatal, once WIS battle). +15% max HP permanently.

name: Iron Charge
effect: Charges through all enemies, dealing Attack + Defense damage to each and taunting all of them for 2 turns.

name: Code Exploit
effect: Cipher's attacks deal +15% damage to enemies affected by any debuff. When Cipher lands a killing blow, all allies restore 8 MP.

name: System Crash
effect: Overloads the target's systems, dealing damage and applying Silence (prevents skill use) for 2 turns.

name: Orbital Relay
effect: At battle start, grants all allies +12% AGI and +6% WIS for 3 turns. Mote passively scans: each turn, reveals whether the enemy has an active buff or debuff.

name: Custodian Override
effect: Transmits a Custodian override signal: deals WIS damage to all enemies, strips one buff from each, and reduces all enemy AGI by 18% for 2 turns.

name: Arcane Overload
effect: When Ashe's MP exceeds 80% capacity, all skill damage increases by 30%. Using a skill that reduces MP below 80% triggers a free basic attack.

name: Ley Burst
effect: Releases a ley-line explosion affecting all enemies for WIS × 3.5 damage. Enemies hit are randomly assigned one of: Stun, Root, or Attack-15% for 2 turns.

name: Wetlands Predator
effect: Tide deals 12% more damage to enemies at full HP. Each kill Tide gets restores 10% of Tide's own Max HP.

name: Riptide
effect: Strikes target twice in rapid succession for Attack × 1.5 each and reduces their AGI by 20% for 2 turns.

name: Adaptive Matrix
effect: The first time each battle that any ally falls below 30% HP, Prism instantly grants them a shield absorbing Defense × 1.0 damage for 1 turn.

name: Refraction Field
effect: Projects a prismatic field over all allies for 2 turns: all incoming damage reduced by 20% and any heal received is amplified by 15%.

name: Ballistic Instinct
effect: Kross gains +2% Attack for each enemy defeated in the current battle (stacks indefinitely). Basic attacks have a 20% chance to inflict Burn for 2 turns.

name: Firestorm Barrage
effect: Fires a rapid barrage at all enemies for Attack × 2.0 each, with a 40% chance to Burn each target for 3 turns.

name: Resonant Care
effect: At the end of each turn, the most injured ally (lowest HP%) automatically receives a minor heal of WIS × 0.5 HP. Lyric's healing cannot be blocked by silence.

name: Harmonic Surge
effect: Sends a harmonic pulse through all allies, healing WIS × 1.5 HP each and restoring 5 MP to each party member.

name: Combat Veteran
effect: Kael's first attack each turn deals +20% damage. Each time Kael kills an enemy, his Attack increases by 5% for the rest of the battle (max 3 stacks).

name: Breach and Clear
effect: A rapid commando strike hitting all enemies for Attack × 1.8. Each enemy hit has a 35% chance to be Stunned for 1 turn.

name: Triage Protocol
effect: At the start of each turn, Lyra-9 automatically restores 3% Max HP to the party member with the lowest HP. Lyra's healing skills are 20% more effective.

name: Regenerative Field
effect: Deploys a medical field around all allies, healing WIS × 2.0 HP each and granting regeneration of 4% Max HP WIS turn for 2 turns.

name: Enforcer's Hide
effect: Grimm reduces all incoming damage by 12%. When Grimm is hit while below 50% HP, he retaliates automatically for 30% of his Attack (once WIS turn).

name: Juggernaut Slam
effect: A crushing full-body slam using both Attack and Defense as damage sources. Taunts all enemies for 2 turns and reduces their Attack by 15%.

name: Blade Dance
effect: Serin's attacks have a 20% chance to hit twice. Each consecutive attack on the same turn increases Serin's AGI by 5% (resets each turn, max 2 stacks).

name: Swarm Blitz
effect: Unleashes a flurry of rapid strikes on up to 3 random enemies for Attack × 1.2 each hit. Applies a 10% AGI debuff to each target hit for 2 turns.

name: Graviton Fury
effect: When Thane's HP drops below 60%, his Attack and AGI increase by 25% for the rest of the battle. Enemies attacking Thane have their AGI reduced by 10% for 1 turn.

name: Eruption Strike
effect: Channels gravitational force into a cataclysmic blow, dealing Attack × 3.2 to the primary target and half that damage to all other enemies. Burns primary target for 8% HP/turn for 3 turns.

name: Resonance Feedback
effect: Each time an ally uses a skill, Mira Echo stores its type (attack/heal/buff). The stored type grants the next Mira skill 15% more potency. Enemies with buffs take 10% more damage from Mira.

name: Aetheric Amplify
effect: Amplifies the entire party's energy — all allies gain +15% Attack, +15% WIS, and their next skill deals 20% additional damage. Lasts 2 turns.

name: Foreman's Grit
effect: Rex cannot be Stunned or Knocked Back. When hit for more than 20% of his Max HP in a single blow, that damage is automatically capped at 20% Max HP.

name: Mine Drill
effect: Uses his industrial drill arm to bore through an enemy, dealing Attack + Defense × 1.5 damage and permanently reducing their Defense by 20% for the rest of the battle.

name: Ghost Protocol
effect: Nova has a 20% chance to completely evade any attack. When Nova evades, the attacker's next action is delayed by losing 10 AGI for 1 turn.

name: System Override
effect: Nova hacks into all enemies simultaneously, dealing WIS-scaled damage, stripping one buff from each, and forcing each to lose 5 MP WIS turn for 2 turns.

name: Void Pulse Resonance
effect: Pascal's attacks generate Void Charge (max 5). At max charge, next skill deals +50% damage and consumes all charges. Charge generates even when missing.

name: Singularity Lance
effect: Fires a collimated Void beam through all enemies in a line, dealing WIS × 3.0 to each and reducing all targets' Defense and WIS by 15% for 2 turns.

name: Field Medic
effect: Rekha's heals cost 5 less MP. Each turn, if any ally is below 50% HP, Rekha regenerates 4 MP passively. Rekha is immune to Poison and Bleed.

name: Combat Stitch
effect: Rapidly patches two allies — heals target 1 for WIS × 1.6 HP and target 2 for WIS × 1.0 HP. Both targets gain +10% Defense for 2 turns.
